label: Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence

node.label: Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence
node.definition: Multi-agent systems coordinate several specialized or peer agents through roles, protocols, shared memory, task allocation, and conflict resolution.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence is modeled as depending on Multi-agent coordination, debate & markets, Workflow, cluster & job orchestration and feeding downstream nodes such as Simulation, operations research & wargaming.
examples: atlas downstream link to Simulation, operations research & wargaming
combined with Multi-agent coordination, debate & markets
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Multi-agent coordination, debate & markets, Workflow, cluster & job orchestration.

dependencies.rationale: Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence integrates Multi-agent coordination, debate & markets as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence integrates Workflow, cluster & job orchestration as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence integrates Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence integrates Skill libraries, workflows & procedural plans as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
In this atlas graph, Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence has an `applies` dependency on Graph-of-Thought & non-linear deliberation with `common` strength.
Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence integrates Episodic memory as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
In this atlas graph, Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence has an `applies` dependency on Memory lifecycle, forgetting & consolidation with `optional` strength.
